action_set_definitions.name: get_system_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current operational metrics from the plant sensors including TMP, effluent COD, MLSS concentration, and cumulative energy consumption.

action_set_definitions.name: update_plant_settings
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts bioreactor and hydraulic control setpoints to optimize treatment performance and energy use.

target_dissolved_oxygen_mgL.description: The desired oxygen concentration in the aeration basin.

sludge_wasting_rate_m3h.description: Rate of sludge removal to control biomass (MLSS) levels.

influent_flow_setpoint.description: Target influent flow rate to manage hydraulic flux on membranes.

action_set_definitions.name: trigger_maintenance_wash
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a short-term chemically enhanced backwash or air-scour to reduce membrane fouling. This is not a full 24-hour CIP.

duration_minutes.description: Duration of the cleaning cycle in minutes (maximum 60).

state_description.influent_flow_rate: The current rate of wastewater entering the plant in cubic meters per hour.
state_description.dissolved_oxygen_mgL: Concentration of dissolved oxygen in the aeration basin (mg/L).
state_description.mixed_liquor_suspended_solids_mgL: The concentration of suspended solids in the mixed liquor (biomass concentration).
state_description.effluent_cod_mgL: Chemical Oxygen Demand in the treated water exiting the system.
state_description.total_energy_kwh: Cumulative energy consumption of the plant equipment.
state_description.ph_level: Current pH level of the wastewater in the primary treatment tank.
state_description.sludge_recycle_ratio: The ratio of sludge returned to the aeration tank from the clarifier.
